title: The Texan
writer: Jules Furthman, James B. Hendryx, Lynn Reynolds
actors: Tom Mix, Gloria Hope, Robert Walker
plot: Tex Benton, riding across the country, sees a turtle, catches a jack rabbit and tests out the old fable of the tortoise and the hare; when the rabbit wins, Tex vows to model his behavior on that style. In a border town, he rescues...
